channel.title: Supplements
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Supplements, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.description: I. The Clinically Dosed Dilemma “Clinically dosed” has become one of the most overused — and misunderstood — claims in the sports supplement industry....
